title: pushing manifest: unexpected EOF
body:
### Issue Description

pushing manifest always fail 
```console
jiazha-mac:test jiazha$ podman manifest push quay.io/openshifttest/etcd-index:33450

Error: pushing manifest list quay.io/openshifttest/etcd-index:33450: unexpected EOF
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```console
jiazha-mac:test jiazha$ podman manifest create quay.io/openshifttest/etcd-index:33450
```
